title: <div><tt>- **AMP.LABS.MEDIA** — educational content, ed-tech tools, public media
content:
- **AMP.LABS.MEDIA** — educational content, ed-tech tools, public media, research

---

### III. Creative Ecosystem: Modular Mythic Projects

**1. ::MET4morfoses (M4)**
- Mythology, Fiction, Religion, Transformation
- Flagship mythic world and narrative system
- Begins as text; expands into video, interactive web, 3D, AR/VR
- Versions: M4_V1, M4_V2, M4_V3…

**2. ::Q_v33R (formerly “QUEER”)**
- Nonfiction, Catharsis, Identity, Public Conversation
- Podcast, video essays, memory, reflection, queer voices
- A narrative mirror to MET4, based in reality

**3. ::GR1ND3R**
- Fiction, Found Footage, Psychological Horror
- Ambiguity, horror, memory rot, unreliable narrative
- Rooted in now, but rhymes with mythic past/future
